news.t: Corgi Breaks Records Again: The Debut of 35 ETFs

holdings.infoBox: OWN is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 12.08%, NVIDIA at 10.30%, Amazon.com at 8.33%, Meta Platforms at 5.80%, and Tesla at 5.65%.

overview.description: The Inside Ownership 100 ETF (OWN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Inside Ownership 100 index. The fund tracks an index of 100 companies from the S&P 500, selected and weighted by insider ownership value as calculated by the index methodology. OWN was launched on Jun 3, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.

data.title: Corgi Breaks Records Again: The Debut of 35 ETFs
data.text: Less than a month after Corgi launched the largest ETF rollout by a single issuer, the firm broke that record. On June 3, Corgi Funds launched 35 new ETFs on Cboe, this time targeting short-term resul...
